blocks.content: Reina blankly stared at Shirone, who was breathing heavily.
Though it couldn't be called a performance to evaluate his sense of pitch, his insight into the essence was beyond imagination.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Who is he exactly? Why would such a child be a butler...?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah, so noisy! You witch!
Shirone and Reina simultaneously turned towards the corridor.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: If you're home, wash your feet and go to sleep, or play a lullaby! Don't throw hysterics elsewhere!
Messy hair. Half-closed sleepy eyes. Rian, still drowsy, entered the room while scratching his six-pack abs.
Then he tilted his head, puzzled to see Shirone sitting beside his sister.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Huh? Shirone, what are you doing here?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well, I was just...
It would be a big deal if Reina found out he was friends with Rian.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Hahaha! Don't tell me? Did you come to get that?
Shirone's face flushed with unbearable embarrassment.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What would Reina think of him if she found out about the crime Rian had committed? And how humiliated would she feel?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No! I just happened to come in.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What do you mean 'no'? Congratulations, Shirone. You've finally become a man.
Rian was relentless.
Of course, underwear might be as trivial as a dish towel among family members.
But for Shirone on the receiving end, it was an unbearable pressure.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What? You two know each other?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone? Yeah, he's my friend.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Hahaha! It's okay. That witch might have a nasty temper, but she doesn't care about stuff like this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is that really the case?
He knew she had an artistic and open-minded personality.
But this was potentially the most serious situation that could arise between a noble and a commoner.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: So your name is Shirone. Don't worry. If Rian says you're a friend, then you're a friend.
Shirone didn't drop his suspicious gaze.
While she might have felt offended as the recipient, Reina took Shirone's attitude positively.
True trust sprouts from doubt, after all.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: But you're quite unique. How did you play like that earlier?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What? Shirone played? I thought it was just my sister's hysteria acting up.
Shirone frowned.
He couldn't understand why Rian would call his sister, who was so beautiful and kind, a witch or hysterical.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone, don't be fooled! This woman is a witch! She might eat you someday!
Rian grabbed Shirone's shoulders and shook him.
His expression was too serious to dismiss as a joke.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Hehe, I'm sorry. My brother is just immature. But I'm relieved he has a friend like you, Shirone.
Rian walked to the table and poured water.
Between siblings, words often fell on deaf ears anyway.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Oh, no. I'm not really...
Reina stared at Shirone, who was scratching his head shyly.
At 17, he should have been grown, but he was truly a pure child.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Hehe, you're really cute.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: If he's that cute, why don't you take him in, sis? I'd be happy if Shirone became family. Hahaha!
Shirone's face turned red as a persimmon at Rian's mischievous joke.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The reason he didn't feel bad was that he unconsciously had a fondness for her.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: My goodness! You're close enough to give away your sister?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What nonsense are you saying? Of course, Shirone is like a brother to me, but I wouldn't care if a witch like you were given to just anyone. Shirone would be the one losing out.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, is that so?
Reina's body leapt up.
Shirone felt dizzy at her jumping power, which easily surpassed a person's height.
Landing in front of Rian, Reina pulled his ear harshly.
Ow, ow, ow! It hurts! It hurts!

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Got you, you culprit!

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: The one who messed with my underwear. It's you, isn't it?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: No! Why blame an innocent person?
Reina was once a swordsmanship prodigy on par with Rai.
As such, the strength concentrated in her fingers was immense.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Fine, I did it! I was going to wear it because I ran out of underwear! Can't you spare a single pair of panties for your brother? Aaargh!
As Reina mercilessly tugged his ear, the bulky Rian stood on tiptoe, unable to move.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: You call that an explanation? Your ear will be torn off if you don't confess properly.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Go ahead, tear it off! I have nothing more to say!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone was on pins and needles.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Regardless of who initiated it, it was a crime they committed together, so he couldn't let Rian suffer alone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Actually, it was my fault.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone, no! You don't know how terrifying this witch is! Run away quickly!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian was trying to play a prank and that's what happened. There was no ill intention. But I'm truly sorry.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Hmm, so that's what happened.
Reina looked at Shirone and Rian alternately with drowsy eyes.
Then she snickered and hit Rian on the head.
Ouch!

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: You're alive thanks to Shirone. If you do it one more time, I'll really make you deaf.
Rian grumbled continuously while rubbing the top of his head.
What wind brought this witch back home?

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Haven't you heard yet? About Rai.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: When have we ever cared about him?

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Rai is taking the certified swordsman exam this time. I came to pick him up. I left the palace with grandfather, but he said he'd meet some friends on the way.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Certified exam?
Rian's eyes shook with shock.
He had acknowledged the difference in skill.
His brother was a genius, after all.
But had the gap widened this much?
The certified qualification was the dream of all who lived in the Kingdom of Tormia and a standard for noble ranking.
The exam is held once a year, and the number of applicants reaches a thousand.
But among them, fewer than thirty people can obtain certification.
For comparison, there's the non-certified qualification.
It's issued by institutions designated by the royal palace; for instance, in the city of Creas, Alpheus Magic School is a representative example.
Upon graduating from the magic school, one becomes a non-certified 10th-grade magician, and thereafter, they can raise their grade by performing various achievements through associations or guilds.
The difference between certified and non-certified ultimately comes down to whether they receive recognition from the royal palace.

Therefore, there are non-certified individuals with skills that don't lag behind the certified ones, but since people tend to gravitate toward money and honor, the overall level of the certified is much higher.
The fact that more than half of the applicants in the annual certified exam already have non-certified qualifications illustrates this difference.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Hmph, good for him. As expected, geniuses are different. He gets a lot of support from home too.
Reina looked at Rian with pity.
Whether he had talent or not, he was her beloved youngest brother.
She hoped he wouldn't be hurt by this news.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: I should go prepare dinner. The seafood from the royal palace needs to be prepared directly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. Goodbye.
Shirone bowed with a regretful heart.
Since he was leaving the mansion tomorrow, he would never meet Reina again.
But the exhilaration of playing the piano with her would be something he'd never forget.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Rian, about your sister.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well... does she have a boyfriend or something?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone regretted asking as soon as he did.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Emotions are like beasts caged in iron; once released, they can lead to uncontrollable consequences.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone, don't tell me?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, no! Just forget it! I just...

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Hahaha! Sis! Sis!
As Rian ran out of the room, a red-faced Shirone chased after him.
Too impatient to take the stairs, Rian stuck his face out over the railing and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Sis! Shirone asked if you have a boyfri—!

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Oh, please stop!
Shirone barely managed to cover Rian's mouth and dragged him back to the room by his waist.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Hmm? What was that? Boyfriend?

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: It's just the children playing around. Now, we just need to steam this. I've removed the poison, so please cook it according to the recipe.
Yes, miss.
As they entered the full-scale cooking process, the maids became busy with their work again.
However, the young man in charge of overseeing the mansion's operations frowned at the sound he had just heard.
Head butler Louis.
With his innate calculation ability and meticulous personality, he was the youngest to rise to the position of head butler in the family's history.
He wore frameless glasses that accentuated his cold impression.

blocks.speaker: Louis
blocks.content: Shirone?
The maids might not have heard of him, but as the head butler, the name was firmly etched in his mind.
He was the contracted boy Temuran had brought for the grand library relocation work.

blocks.speaker: Louis
blocks.content: Why with the youngest master...?
For someone who had pledged to dedicate his life to the prosperity of the Ozent family, this was a matter he couldn't overlook.
Something he wasn't aware of was clearly happening.
With a flash in his eyes, he called a butler and gave instructions.

blocks.speaker: Louis
blocks.content: Tell the deputy butler to come to my room immediately.
From the crack of dawn, shouts echoed through the large training ground.
Rian was training with greater intensity than usual.
The news of Rai taking the certified exam had poured oil on his fire.
He was determined to catch up.
With that thought, he repeated countless strikes.
Kaite watched his disciple's splendid sword dance and was confident.

blocks.speaker: Kaite
blocks.content: He's definitely improved.
Physical strength, energy, technique. He had made remarkable progress in all aspects.
With this level of skill, he could easily subdue bandits near the city.
But in a duel against someone formally trained in swordsmanship, he still had a long way to go.
The issue was the schema.
Rian's greatest strength, his impulsivity, was now acting as a disadvantage.

blocks.speaker: Kaite
blocks.content: Everyone has their own way. The drawback of not being cold-headed is nothing compared to that fiery power.
He swung a club twice as heavy as a longsword with sheer strength.
Considering air resistance, it was a strength that wouldn't be out of place wielding a greatsword.
Just imagining how the efficiency would be maximized if he could grasp the schema was already exciting.

blocks.speaker: Kaite
blocks.content: Stop! Ten minutes of rest!
Rian returned to Kaite, panting.
Kaite discovered the burning passion in his disciple's eyes.
He had such eyes on a day a year ago.
Back then, it faded quickly, but this time was different.
Rai was going to the royal palace.
Rian's flame would never wither again.
Young master! Young master!
A butler from the mansion came running breathlessly.
Arriving in front of Rian, who was moistening his throat, he said without even catching his breath.

blocks.speaker: Butler
blocks.content: It's terrible! The lady says to come to the mansion quickly!

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: My sister? What's the matter suddenly? If it's about my brother, I'm not interested. Tell her to handle it herself.

blocks.speaker: Butler
blocks.content: No, it's not that. The contracted boy named Shirone is in mortal danger right now.
